name: Siyuan
tagline: A privacy-first, self-hosted, fully open source personal knowledge management software, written in typescript and golang.
description:
A privacy-first, self-hosted, fully open source personal knowledge management software, written in typescript and golang.

Docs: https://github.com/siyuan-note/siyuan?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  siyuan:
    image: b3log/siyuan:v3.3.5
    volumes:
      - siyuan_workspace:/siyuan/workspace
    environment:
      - TZ=${TZ:-UTC}
      - PUID=1000
      - PGID=1000
      - SIYUAN_ACCESS_AUTH_CODE=b69918bc8fe89e66adc69c446730ae9f
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - wget
        - --spider
        - --quiet
        - http://127.0.0.1:6806/api/system/version
      interval: 15s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 20s
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42111:6806
volumes:
  siyuan_workspace: null
